details.IncidentDetail: "[1] REQ NOTIFY CT FOR SNOW ON RDWY"
"[7] XRAY WAS OO VEH ON PHONE "
"[1] VEH WENT HEAD ON INTO DITCH "
"[7] CORR LINE 2 // RP ADVS THAT IT IS NEG PATROL VEH // SV IS A WHI VEH POSS A TAHOE OR SIM TO"
"[5] RP ADVS HE IS AT SLOW SPEEDS DUE TO THE SNOW - PV WAS AT APPX 70 AND TC'D INTO THE DRIVERS SIDE OF HIS VEH "
"[2] GOT HIT BY A PATROL VEH "
"[5] ON BOTH EB AND WB LNS "
"[14] [Appended, 19:37:36] [6] OTHER VEH IS A SEMI TRK AND TRL - BACKED UP AND HIT THE RP'S VEH "
"[13] [Appended, 19:37:36] [5] DRK GRY PBLT ON THE RHS "
"[1] BLU SEMI TK REEFER VS PETER BUILT SEMI TK "
"[11] RP WILL WAIT ON RHS FOR CHP "
"[5] RP TOLD TK DRVR HE WOULD 1023 ON RHS // DRVR CONT ON"
"[4] WHILE STOPPED SEMI TK REAR ENDED RP "
"[14] BOTH VEHS GOING APPROX 5MPH IN TRAFFIC "
"[9] RP WALKED UP TO FED EX WINDOW WHILE STUCK IN TRAFFIC "
"[16] PER SISKIYOU SO LT VIA LL // INMATE THAT WAS INVLD IN TC HAS COP // REQ CHP TAKE THE REPORT // XFER TO 37-L"
"[5] DRIVER SIDE DOOR OF PATROL VEH WILL NOT OPEN"
"[7] 42-S3 NB LNS STOPPED TO GET TK OUT "
"[3] 42-S3 UTL SO FAR / INQ WITH RP IF STILL 1097"
"[2] 1185 IS 1097 // PICKING UP A US POSTAL TRUCK"
"[12] [Notification] [CHP]-FIRE LL ADVS TAKING DRVR HOME // CHP WILL NEED TO TOW VEH"

Log.Location: "I80 E / I80 E Sr65 N Con"
